channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: c.1978- Fernandes FPO-75VSB OPB Style MIJ Vintage Bass “Sunburst” — $1,100
item.description:
$1,100 · Very Good · Bridge guitars

c.1979- Fernandes FPO-75VSB OPB Style Bass MIJ Vintage “Sunburst”


Fernandes

FPO-75VSB

made in Japan

Good condition

20frets(medium type)70-80%

Neck is straight 

There is no buzz

strings are replaced

Truss rod is workin.

string height

4string 12F 2.2mm

1string 12F 2.0mm


There are some minor scratches.


NECK:Maple 

RADIUS:7 1/4

BODY:

PICKUPS: Original single coil

PICKGUARD:Original 

CONTROLS: Replaced

TURNER:Original

BRIDGE:Original

CASE:Nothing



It Good vintage sounds great,

Bass has been setup for playing！




PLEASE READ CAREFULLY:


Shipments to the United States may be delayed due to customs duties.

* If there is a shipping accident, we will always refund your money, but it will take about two weeks to get the money back due to the communication between Japan and the country where it was shipped.




* Bridge guitars guitars are certified luthier inspected and set up for playing. We strive for honesty in our listings and try to note any and all issues with guitars that we sell, and guarantee the functionality of guitars we are selling unless guitar is listed as a "for parts/not working" guitar.




* All guitars are carefully packed using new guitar specific boxes and bubble wrapped and shipped via Japan Post EMS with insurance and tracking. Any import duties are the buyers responsibility. Please be aware of any import duties your country/region might have. Declared value must match the final sale price for insurance purposes in shipping. If you don't see your country listed in our shipping locations, please ask us for a shipping quote.




* If you have any questions, please contact us! We love to talk about guitars, and we love to find great vintage Japanese guitars for people!




Thank you for looking, please see our other listings for more interesting and unique Japanese guitars

item.title: Schecter SLS Evil Twin-5 Bass Guitar plus Schecter SGR6 Bass Hardshell Case 2026 - Satin Black — $1,200
item.description:
$1,200 · Excellent · Izzy's Bass Gear

This bass in in excellent condition and the Fishman Fluence Bass Soapbar pickups are clean and punchy!

item.title: Fender American Professional II Jazz Bass with Maple Fretboard 2020 - Present - Dark Night — $1,308
item.description:
$1,308 · Excellent · Teleharmonic16

Fender American Professional II Jazz Bass -- Dark Night / Maple -- Mint, Brand Hard Case & Strings-- SN US23079822

No fluff. Mint condition American Pro II Jazz Bass in Dark Night with a maple neck. If you've seen this color in person you already know -- it's just about the best looking bass Fender makes right now. Deep, dark, clean. The maple board sets it off perfectly.

Brand new strings on it, comes with a brand new case. Ready to play the day it arrives.

The American Pro II is the real deal. Slim C neck with rolled fingerboard edges so it feels broken in right out of the gate. V-Mod II single-coil pickups -- punchy, articulate, classic Jazz Bass tone. This is Fender's working professional line, not a beginner instrument dressed up to look like one.

Whatever you're playing, whatever the gig -- this bass handles it. If you know what this is, you don't need me to say another word.

Includes: Bass, brand new case, brand new strings installed

Color: Dark Night / Maple

Condition: Mint

Serial: US23079822

item.title: Bacchus 5 string jazz bass Wl5 - Weathered grey — $950
item.description:
$950 · Very Good · Ron's Music Emporium

5 string craft series Bacchus jazz bass. Made in Japan. Ash body. Maple neck with rosewood board. Nordstrand single cool jazz pickups are currently installed. Comes with the original bacchus split coil pickups. Plays great and sounds great with the Nordstrand pickups. A few minor dings. This is a matte oil finish. Comes with a fender gig bag.
please ask questions.

item.title: G&L G&L USA CLF Research L-2000 Cherryburst 4 String Bass & Case L2000 2021 - Cherryburst — $1,600
item.description:
$1,600 · Very Good · Rob's Store

Up for grabs is a killer 2021 USA-made G&L CLF Research L-2000 in a stunning Cherryburst finish. If you’re looking for a tone monster that seamlessly blends vintage CLF aesthetics with modern Leo Fender horsepower, this is it.

This bass is an absolute Swiss Army Knife in the studio and on stage, delivering everything from modern aggressive punch to classic warm thump thanks to the dual MFD humbuckers and the classic tri-tone control system.

Specs & Features:

  • Model: CLF Research L-2000 (Made in USA)
  • Year: 2021
  • Finish: Cherryburst
  • Controls: Volume, Treble, Bass, 3-way pickup selector, series/parallel switch, and 3-way pre-amp toggle (off/on/on with high-end boost).
  • Hardware: Classic CLF control plate and machined bridge.

Condition Note:

This bass plays, feels, and sounds incredible. It is structurally 100% rock solid.

The only issue is a 1.5-inch finish crack (strictly cosmetic, in the clear coat only—not in the wood), which I have clearly highlighted in the photos. Aside from this minor cosmetic blemish, the bass is in fantastic shape with minimal play wear, a clean neck, and plenty of fret life left.

Comes with the original hard case and case candy/spec sheet shown in pics

Bass will be packed securely and shipped fully insured.

item.title: Fender Fender Player Plus Precision Bass Silver Smoke 2024 - Satin Urethane Silver Smoke — $1,015.03
item.description:
$1,015.03 · Excellent · Michael's Gear

Selling my Fender Player Plus Precision Bass in Silver Smoke, purchased new at the end of 2024.

The bass has been used very rarely and is in excellent condition. It has always been well cared for, with no functional issues, and performs flawlessly. The neck is straight, the electronics work perfectly, and it plays and sounds exactly as it should.

Cosmetically, it is very clean with only minimal signs of use, if any. It has been gigged once and has spent most of its time stored safely when not in use.

A great opportunity to get a nearly new Player Plus Precision Bass without paying full retail.

item.title: Ibanez EDB555-WNF Ergodyne Bass 2007 - 2010 - Walnut Flat — $479.99
item.description:
$479.99 · Good · MO Gear

EDB555. Plays and sounds as it should. Truss rod works fine, neck and frets all seem ok. Normal hardware tarnish and signs of use you would expect from an older bass. No case but will pack safe.

The EDB555 features an ergonomic shaped double-cutaway light ash body with curved back and scooped front bolted to a wenge and bubinga neck with a 24-fret rosewood fingerboard with pearl dot position markers, side dots, a graphite nut and a black headstock. Components include a set of Duncan Ibanez passive pickups on the neck and bridge positions with and an EQBII active 2-band EQ, an Accu-cast B105 fixed bridge with 16.5mm string, Ibanez Die-cast machine heads and chrome hardware.

No trades, no returns, comes as is. Shipping with reverb protection signature required.

item.title: Fender Custom Shop Jazz Bass — $2,500
item.description:
$2,500 · Excellent · Larry's Boutique

For sale is a beautiful 2023 Fender Custom Shop ‘60 Jazz in relatively rare Ocean Turquoise Metallic. Excellent condition, and includes accessories — OEM case, COA, shop floor traveler, strap, hang tags, pickup covers, etc.

Weight is right around 9.5 lbs. with the bridge pickup cover included.

item.title: Rickenbacker 90th Anniversary 4005XC 2021 - Amber Fireglo — $1,500
item.description:
$1,500 · Fair · Larry's Boutique

For sale is a Rickenbacker 4005XC 90th Anniversary in FAIR condition. The bass is in EXCELLENT condition except the truss rod is cracked and will need replacing. Hence the FAIR condition rating. It will cost approximately $1200.00 to replace. The bass is currently playable and setup nicely. The truss rod doesn't move so the action via the truss rod is not adjustable. It includes original case candy and hard shell case. A couple of the screws have been replaced.

item.title: 1988 Erine Ball Music Man Stingray Bass 1988 - Translucent Red - 4-Bolt, 2-Band EQ (with Extras!) — $3,450
item.description:
$3,450 · Very Good · Not Bob's Shop

Up for sale is a beautiful 1988 Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay 4-String Bass. The neck pocket is factory-stamped "REDT Jan 7 1988," confirming production date and factory desirable Translucent Red finish. Body is single piece Ash with nice grain and full maple neck has the nice figuring typical of this period.

This bass features the legendary combination that players and vintage collectors hunt for: the early 4-bolt neck plate and the classic 3-knob, 2-band EQ (Volume, Treble, Bass) configuration. This specific era delivers that iconic, raw, punchy growl and slap tone that made the StingRay famous.

Electronics & Originality:

  • Preamp Upgrade: The electronics have been upgraded to a premium, period-correct Mojotone MM Clone V2. This boutique board is a 1:1 exact component replica of Leo Fender's classic 2-band circuit. It is built with custom-tapered vintage pots and the rare, original LM4250CN IC chip for 100% authentic vintage tone with modern reliability.
  • Originality: the original factory stock circuit board was safely preserved and is included in the sale. This allows the next owner to enjoy flawless, noise-free performance today while retaining 100% of the instrument's long-term vintage collector value.
  • Pickup: The original late-1980s factory humbucker pickup is untouched and original to the bass.

Condition Note:

  • Neck & Frets: Absolutely excellent condition. The neck is straight, and the frets have plenty of life with no dead spots, deep divots, or buzzing. It offers low, fast action.
  • Body: Shows honest, vintage character from nearly 40 years of love. There is buckle rash on the back that has not broken through the translucent red finish, along with typical small surface dings and about a half-dozen small paint chips along the edges.
  • Structure: No deep wood gouges, extra drilled holes, cracks, or structural issues whatsoever. A rock-solid player's vintage machine.

Case: Ships safely in a premium, period-correct vintage black Tolex hardwood hardshell case with a striking blue velour interior that complements the translucent red finish beautifully. (Note: This is a premium aftermarket case, not the factory Music Man branded case).

Shipping & Setup:The bass will be professionally packed with the strings slacked and the headstock securely supported to prevent any movement in transit. Fully insured shipping via Reverb Safe Shipping.

Flat-rate shipping is $120 to cover a heavy-duty bass box, professional packing materials, and full Reverb Safe Shipping insurance. If you live regionally and the actual shipping label cost ends up being significantly less, I will gladly refund you the exact cash difference immediately after printing the label.

item.title: Schecter Guitar Research Diamond series Ultra Bass 2010s - Black gloss — $599
item.description:
$599 · Very Good · Brock House Guitars

Very good condition 9volt Emg hz active bass from schecter Korea. Yes not China, much better quality. Bass rocks compared to a passive bass, quality neck through construction. A rockin/metal pleasure to play. bass has been touched up on bottom of body. has a few bumps and bruises. Comes with gigbag. Please see photos

item.title: 1973 Fender Precision Bass with Maple Fretboard in Natural Finish — $3,041.48
item.description:
$3,041.48 · Good · Andy's Vintage Guitars

Made by Fender in USA 53 years ago, this bass is just stunning. The neck is sublime, made with flamed maple , which is extremely rare on a vintage fender. Slim neck profile, low action and super comfortable. the original natural finish is in great condition too. bridge upgraded so a Schaller. The original electronic is long gone and the bass is now equipped with a brand new set of Geezer Butler Passive EMG PJ set. Great player and such a stunning instrument. Comes with a hard case

item.title: Fender American Ultra II Jazz Bass V with Maple Fretboard - Avalanche — $2,000
item.description:
$2,000 · Excellent · Sung's Gear Depot

Excellent condition, purchased new in 2025 and very well cared for in a smoke-free home. No issues whatsoever—plays and sounds exactly as it should.


This is Fender’s flagship production 5-string Jazz Bass featuring:


* Avalanche finish

* Quartersawn Maple neck & Maple fingerboard

* Ultra II Noiseless Vintage Jazz Bass pickups

* Active/Passive switching (S-1)

* 3-band active EQ with selectable mid frequency (325Hz / 750Hz)

* HiMass bridge (top-load or string-through)

* Original Fender molded hardshell case and case candy included


The bass has never been gigged heavily and has been kept in excellent condition. It has a comfortable Modern “D” neck, ultra satin finish, and one of the most versatile tones you’ll find in a Jazz Bass. These features are standard on the American Ultra II series. (Fender⁠)


Selling only because I recently purchased a new bass and need to thin out the collection.


*Additional Tortoise pickguard (included with the sale)


Feel free to message me with any questions or if you’d like additional photos.

item.title: Bass Mods K534 Not sure - White — $1,700
item.description:
$1,700 · Very Good · Matthew's Gear Depot

For Sale: Bass Guitar – Gold Hardware, Bartolini Electronics, Excellent Condition Bass mods

This is a beautiful bass in great condition with premium upgrades that deliver outstanding tone and performance.

Features:

  • Gold hardware
  • Bartolini pickup
  • Upgraded Bartolini preamp for powerful, clear, and versatile sound
  • Excellent playing condition
  • Clean, well cared for, and ready to play

This bass has a rich, punchy tone with plenty of clarity, making it a great choice for live performances, studio recording, or practice. The Bartolini electronics provide exceptional sound quality and versatility across a wide range of musical styles.

Serious inquiries only. Feel free to contact me with any questions or to arrange a time to check it out.

item.title: Burns London Scorpion Bass - Satin Black — $799
item.description:
$799 · Very Good · Hazelwood Acres Musical

Very good condition, electronics are clean & function as they should. Looks to be all original aside from the added black speed knobs, & the strap button relocations from the previous owner. No case included.

From England to the world. Jim Burns created the Burns company in the 60's as a true alternative to American instruments. Instead of just making lesser copies of famous US guitars, Burns had his own ideas about how a guitar should look, perform and sound.

The highly acclaimed band The Shadows used Burns instruments exclusively for years, helping spread the name of these instruments.

The Burns guitar company has gone through all types of stages, and have closed and reopened several times.

SCORPION BASS

The Scorpion Bass might look out of place next to the other reissue Burns Basses (Bison and Marquee models), but this is also in fact a recreation of a Burns bass from yesteryear. Ths original Scorpion Bass was launched in 1979 and clearly shows that Burns were aiming at a younger and "angrier" type of bass player. Heavy Metal was born around these days, and the Scorpion bass fitted right in.

To obtain the maximum punch, Burns chose a standar 34" scale for this bass.

Electronics are maybe more straightforward than other Burns models, with the tried and tested P/J pickup arrangement, controlled by 2 Volume, 1 Tone, and 1 three way Telecaster type lever switch. Of course there is a hidden plus: a miniswitch to connect both pickups out of phase, producing a thin and nasal effect, perfect for guitar-like parts and as an effect too for intros, etc.

item.title: Wingbass NT-5 - Satin Finish (2024, like new! Nano POG onboard!) — $1,500
item.description:
$1,500 · Excellent · Vince on Reverb

You have found a Wingbass NT-5 in brand new condition, with gig bag.
The WingBass NT-5 is the same in all aspects as a standard 34" scale bass guitar, but with the first register (octave) of the neck not present. It has exclusively the second octave. Outstanding to work on upper register skills, for travel, and very easy playing at home.

Included is the original Wing Instruments strap, and an extra strap. The black tape-wound strings currently on there are from the manufacturer (Wing Instruments), and they are not fully broken in. I bought this from the original owner, who had bought it directly from the manufacturer. Neither of us played it much. I hardly played it at all because of relocation and job commitments. I lament this, because this is truly a beautiful instrument with top-notch craftsmanship.

• Built-in Nano POG. This particular bass has the Nano POG octave pedal electronics installed in the instrument, so your pedalboard does not need an octave pedal. The sound is amazing!!!
• Black Limba Body.
• Bartolini Pickup.
• Mohagany Neck Through.

When things settle for me, I would love to have a 6-string Wing Bass NT-6.

Priced to sell!! Immediate shipment!!!
$1,500. Free shipping to continental USA.
Continental USA sale only.

Wing Instruments Website: WingInstruments dot com

item.title: Ibanez Ergodyne 2003 — $600
item.description:
$600 · Very Good · Tyler's Gear Locker

Up for sale is an Ibanez Ergodyne EDB 4-string bass in very good condition. It plays well, has a fast comfortable neck, and features the lightweight ergonomic Ergodyne body design that’s known for its playing comfort.

Made in Korea

item.title: Warwick Streamer $$ Fretless 2006 - Honey Violin — $1,910.64
item.description:
$1,910.64 · Very Good · Stathan's Bass Shop

Up for sale is a magnificent Made in Germany Warwick Streamer $$ (Double Buck) Fretless 4-string, in excellent condition. This is a factory-original fretless instrument, not a conversion, featuring an unlined boutique Ebony fingerboard that delivers an incredible, singing "mwah" tone with endless sustain.


To my knowledge, the Streamer was only released as a $$ (Double Buck) model for a single year, and a fretless version was never 'officially' cataloged, making this a highly rare instrument.


This bass is a tone monster, perfectly suited for everything from progressive metal (think Beyond Creation/Obscura style tech-death) to jazz-fusion and fluid session work. The bridge saddles and nut have been upgraded to bone for a more even sound and endless mwah.


Condition: The bass is in excellent structural and cosmetic shape, showing only minor, normal signs of use which are clearly shown in the pictures. The ebony fingerboard is clean and in great condition. Electronics are fully functional, dead quiet, and the truss rod works perfectly.


Shipping: Will be packed with professional care and shipped fully insured across Europe. Please contact me for accurate shipping rates to your specific location or if you have any questions.

item.title: Sire Marcus Miller P5 4-String Bass — $475
item.description:
$475 · Excellent · Home of Beauties

This p-bass was originally purchased in March of 2024.  It has served as a secondary instrument to my other basses for when I wanted to play a more traditional p-bass.  The bass has been played at home and has not been gigged. I acquired another p-bass earlier this year and have decided to let this one go.

There are a few light marks near the strap pins from some strap rub (tried to get this in the photos).  Also, there are some light scratches in the pickguard below and to the right of the pickup.These occurred when using my fingernails to try to peel the darn “Ready to Play” sticker that Sire stuck on the pickguard (see original photo from Sweetwater).  The protective plastic had already been peeled off, and they plopped a sticker on the pickguard (really Sire?).  It took some work to get the sticker off, and unfortunately the pickguard scratched easily.  So, unfortunately, those scratches have been there since day one but luckily are not very noticeable unless one looks closely.

Here are specs for the Sire p5:

  • Number of Strings:4
  • Left-/Right-handed:Right-handed
  • Body Shape:Marcus Miller P5
  • Body Material:Alder
  • Color:Mild Green
  • Body Finish:Gloss Polyurethane
  • Neck Material:Roasted Hard Maple
  • Neck Shape:C
  • Radius:9.5"
  • Fingerboard Material:Roasted Hard Maple
  • Fingerboard Inlay:Black Dots
  • Number of Frets:20, Medium
  • Scale Length:34"
  • Nut Width:1.653"
  • Nut Material:Bone
  • Bridge/Tailpiece:Marcus Miller Vintage-S
  • Tuners:Open Gear with Clover buttons
  • Middle Pickup:Marcus Miller Vintage Fat P Revolution Split Single-coil
  • Controls:1 x master volume, 1 x master tone
  • Strings:Ernie Ball, .045-.100
  • 8lbs 10oz

The original strings are still on the bass and in good condition.  No gig bag included but will ship with original inner packaging (box-in-a-box configuration).  Please feel free to send a message if you have any questions.

item.title: Ibanez SR5PBLTD-DEL Limited Premium Soundgear 5-String Electric Bass Guitar Dragon Eye Burst Low Gloss — $1,690
item.description:
$1,690 · Brand New · The 1979 Shop

Ibanez SR5PBLTD-DEB Limited Edition Dragon Eye Burst Premium Soundgear 5-String Electric Bass Guitar

Becoming harder to find in brand new unplayed condition such as this fine example.

7-1/2 LBS Approx. Weight

African mahogany body with poplar burl and birds-eye maple with low-gloss finish

Atlas-5 15-piece neck construction of Panga Panga, Maple, Padauk, Purpleheart, and Walnut with KTS titanium rod reinfocing

Roasted birds-eye maple fingerboard, stainless steel frets, and Premium fret-edge treatment

Nordstrand Big Single pickups

Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ, active/passive switch, and mid-frequency selector switch

item.title: Left handed Sandberg VS4 2021 Matte black — $1,250.84
item.description:
$1,250.84 · Mint · Bishop

Mint rare left handed Sandberg

Body
Model: California II VS-4 Left-Handed
Color: Matte Black
Body: European Ash

Neck
Construction: Bolt-On
Fretboard: Ebony
Radius: 14"
Frets: 22 + Zero Fret
Fretboard Inlays: None (white side dots)
Neck Wood: Canadian Hard Rock Maple
Finish: Satin
Neck Profile: Thin C-Shape
Nut: 1.56" (39.5mm) Graphite
Neck Depth @ 1st Fret: 0.79" (20mm)
Scale: 34"
Headstock: Matching Black

Electronics
Pickups: Sandberg Black Label Split-Coil
Preamp: Custom 9v 2-Band EQ (designed by Glockenklang)
Controls: Volume (push/pull for active/passive), Blend, Bass, Treble (acts as tone knob when in passive mode)

Hardware
Bridge: Sandberg Custom 18.5mm - 20mm Adjustable String Spacing
Tuners: Sandberg Ultra Light
Hardware Finish: Black

Miscellaneous
Case: Sandberg Gig Bag
Made In Germany
Instrument Weight: 8.9 lbs.

item.title: Gibson EB-2 1964 - 1972 - Sunburst — $2,970.75
item.description:
$2,970.75 · Good · JJ’s Joints

A lovely mid 60’s Gibson EB-2 up for sale. This one embodies what every vintage instrument should look like after surviving 59 years of abuse. It certainly is a shame that most of these cool old guitars find themselves in the closet of a wealthy businessman’s closet and not touring the world for people to enjoy.

Fortunately, that is not the case with this one. It has toured coast to coast several times over and been thoroughly loved. Despite its wear, this guitar is heck of a player and the original pickup sounds delightful. The neck is quite chunky and feels much more like an earlier 60’s Gibson bass. It has been refretted and was given a clean bill of health by MacKinnon Guitar Co. Apart from the missing mute and pickguard, the bass is all original and will be shipped in it’s original case.

item.title: Fender Custom Shop '59 Precision Bass Closet Classic — $3,499
item.description:
$3,499 · Excellent · JJ’s Joints

Here is a stunning and early Fender Custom Shop Closet Classic ‘59 Precision Bass. The bass weighs in at just 8lbs 7 oz. It is extremely resonant and light weight. It has been enjoyed lightly in a home studio environment. It is in fabulous shape.

These basses are lightly relic’d and made to look as if they’ve spent most of their time in a closet. This will include it’s original hard shell case, COA, key, pickup covers and some case candy.

item.title: ESP LTD B-205SM 2016 - 2018 - See Thru Black Satin — $399
item.description:
$399 · Good · Potent Pedals

LTD B-205SM bass for sale. Its in great condition with no major issues. There may be a few spots of wear or pick scratches as is expected with a well taken care of instrument. It is fully functional and sounds great.. with hot active pickups with a very dynamic EQ that can mellow them out nicely. For the price, it is hard to beat. Please let me know if you have any questions.

item.title: Ibanez SRAS7-CBS Ashula Bass Workshop Hybrid Fretless / Fretted 7-String Soundgear Electric Bass Guitar Cosmic Blue Starburst — $1,379
item.description:
$1,379 · Brand New · The 1979 Shop

Ibanez Ashula SRAS7-CBS Soundgear Bass Workshop 7-String Hybrid Fretless / Fretted Electric Bass Guitar

New Condition, Unplayed

10 LBS Approx. Weight

Features:

  • A truly unique instrument that combines fretless and fretted fingerboards
  • 1 fingerboard holds 3 fretless and 4 fretted strings
  • Fretted side of fingerboard is rosewood while the fretless side is bubinga
  • Overlapping ranges let you jump between fingerboards, without losing your place
  • Beautiful burl poplar/ash top on an okoume body is lightweight and tonally rich
  • 7-piece maple/walnut/bubinga neck delivers epic stability
  • Mono-rail V bridge isolates strings for maximum vibration transfer and minimal sympathetic vibration
  • Includes Super J Ashula pickups, an AeroSilk piezo pickup, and custom active EQ
  • Strings: D’Addario Roundwound (fretted)/D’Addario Flatwound (fretless) .045/.065/.085/.105/.045/.065/.080

item.title: Schecter Stiletto Studio-5 FF Fanned-Fret Active 5-String Bass 2010s - Honey Satin — $744
item.description:
$744 · Excellent · Dustin's Shop

Check out the specs on the Schecter website. Only been used on one gig, otherwise just rehearsals. No surface defects. Recently got a professional setup. I struggle with the longer scale (36" on the low B) due to a childhood wrist deformity. Needing to just get a traditional 34" scale, likely a Sire P5 (so open to trade!).

Other than my inability to play the lowest end, this thing is sick. Sounds incredible. I love that multiscale options exist out there for budget players like myself, that still want quality instruments. The wood is gorgeous. Schecter is making some dope stuff these days (my primary 4 string is a Model T). I have been the only owner of this bass and have treated it well.

Let me know if there is any info or pictures you need. I want to make sure you are 100% comfortable with your purchase. I also have a template for a pick guard if you are interested.

Comes with the hardshell case pictured.

item.title: Fender Jazz Bass (Modified) — $800
item.description:
$800 · Very Good · Alan's Gear Depot

Built this out of parts during the pandemic and it's served me very well for about a half dozen gigs per year since then. It's got some wear (see pics), but nothing major. Let me know if you have any questions. Thanks!

Body is a '97 MiM Fender

Neck is from 2021 and is also genuine Fender

Tuners are Hipshot USA Ultralights

Pickups are from Seymour Duncan

Bridge and neck plate are standard Fender Mexico parts

item.title: Fender Bass Not Sure of Model — $170
item.description:
$170 · Good · Mylee Dream

Red Fender Jazz Bass guitar with Jesus Loves You sticker #bass #christian #jesuslovesyou #red recently had its neck re-evened. Nothings wrong with the quality. I just don’t have time to learn how to play.

item.title: Ibanez Artcore Series AGB205-DVS AGB 205 5-string Semi-Hollowbody Bass Guitar — $970
item.description:
$970 · Very Good · The 1979 Shop

Ibanez Artcore Series AGB205-DVS-12-01 AGB 205 5-String Semi-Hollow Hollowbody Electric Bass Guitar

8.2 LBS Approx. Weight

Maple top with ivory multi-binding on maple back and sides mated to a set-in mahogany and maple neck with a 22-fret rosewood fingerboard with ivory binding and pearl dot position markers. Components include a pair of ACHB Artcore Humbucker passive pickups, an Artcore Custom 5 bridge with stop tailpiece and 15mm string spacing, Sure Grip III knobs, a plastic nut, and Ibanez tuning machines.

This is a pre-owned/used instrument in good condition. Signs of wear. Electronics working.

  • Its electronics have been tested and function as they should.
  • See the provided pix for best idea of overall cosmetic condition.
  • A generic gig bag will be included. No other extras are available for this item.

item.title: MTB Kingston Saratoga 5-String Electric Bass Guitar Trans Black Burst — $990
item.description:
$990 · Excellent · The 1979 Shop

MTB Kingston Saratoga 5-String Electric Bass Guitar Trans Black Burst

Demo model, very good condition

8.8 LBS Approx. Weight

  • Trans Black Burst
  • Basswood Body With Flamed Maple Top
  • Maple Neck and Laurel Fingerboard
  • Matching Headstock
  • Licensed Hipshot Tuners
  • Graphite Truss Rod
  • Passive MTD J Single Coil Pick Ups
  • Active MTD 3-Band EQ
  • 34" Scale
  • 19 MM Spacing

item.title: 2000 Rickenbacker 4003 in Turquoise — $3,300
item.description:
$3,300 · Very Good · Sylvester's Attic of Music and Trinkets

Up for sale is a fabulous 2000 Rickenbacker 4003 bass in the very desirable color Turquoise. I sold my own personal bass in this color last year for $4400 (it was absolute mint condition) and it literally sold within a couple of days. This one is not from my personal collection but is in very good condition, in fact it's in a condition that would exceed most player's expectations for its age. It comes with the original hard shell case and original owner's manual, polishing cloth, key, etc. It appears that the bridge pickup was switched out for another but I don't have the details on it; however, the original pickup is included and shown in the photo with the bag. The change is not at all noticeable to me but I'm not a bass player nor an expert on these basses but my point is that I don't see any visible damage or alteration.

I'm really picky about instrument condition so I gave it a very thorough once over, looking for any blemishes I could find. There are a small amount of surface scratches on the front in the finish above the pickup area, most likely from a pick, and you can see them in the photo with the ceiling fan's reflection (note, w/o looking in a strong direct light, they're not very noticeable at all). There is also a small indentation on the back of the bass near the neck joint but it's only in the clear coat and quite insignificant...I'd say most people wouldn't give it a second thought. There is a very small chip in the paint on the headstock near the G tuner, again shown in the pic's. And lastly, there are some minor surface scratches on the lower edge of the bass, basically in the area between the input jack and the first pickup, but nothing through the paint that I can see. Apart from that, the instrument is super clean and plays/sounds fantastic, not unlike the one I sold last year. The bass weights in at 9.23lbs.

If you have any other questions, please feel free to email me - thanks!

item.title: Vintage Harmony H-22 Bass Guitar 1963 - Sunburst — $1,899
item.description:
$1,899 · Very Good · Degroovia

Vintage Harmony H22 Bass Guitar 1963 - Sunburst. A Great sounding and easy playing bass. It has a 30" scale length, 1.75" width at the nut, a Brazilian rosewood fingerboard, a DeArmond Gold Tone pickup, Volume and Tone controls and tone selector knob for full bass tone or baritone registers. The knobs are Harmony made and the correct type but wrong color. Overall, a very solid and original example of this legendary bass. It has lots of dings, scratches and play/age wear. Still plays easy up and down the neck. Sounds amazing too. Missing tailpiece cover and does not come with a case. Thanks for looking. Please message me with any questions.

item.title: Gibson Memphis ES-335 Bass Vintage Sunburst 2013 Semi-Hollow Electric Bass — $3,137.07
item.description:
$3,137.07 · Very Good · Sell Us Your Guitar

Here for sale we have a Gibson Memphis ES-335 Semi-Hollow Electric Bass in Vintage Sunburst finish. Made in the USA in 2013, this bass features a set-neck construction comprising a semi-hollow Laminated Maple body, Mahogany neck, and 20-fret Rosewood fingerboard. Other appointments include an aftermarket Babictz FCH 3-point 4-string bridge, Grover Open Gear Tuners, double bound body, bound neck, and a set of Gibson Humbucking pickups. These pickups are wired to two independent volume controls, two independent tone controls, and a three-way pickup selector.


The Mahogany neck sits comfortably in the hand, with the profile feeling chunky without being cumbersome, offering a dependable grip whilst also providing a smooth and articulate playing experience. The Rosewood fingerboard feels pleasant under the fingers, whilst the 12” radius  allows for ease of different techniques such as slap bass or chordal playing. The double cutaway body design allows the player to have unobstructed access to the entire register, whilst its semi-hollow nature also makes longer durations of playing a comfortable experience.


The semi-hollow construction provides an open airiness to the sound which makes the instrument suitable for a wide range of genres whilst retaining a unique and unmistakable voice. The Gibson humbuckers deliver a thick and powerful tone, with smooth rounded lows, clear and open mid range and a sweet treble response that captures the attack and aggression of your playing. The pots feel nicely responsive, allowing you to dial in your perfect tone with ease, whilst the simplicity of the controls ensure that you can stay focussed on your playing whilst still offering comprehensive control of your tone. 


Brand- Gibson

Model- Memphis ES-335 Bass

Finish- Vintage Sunburst

Year- 2013

Made In- USA

Body- Laminated Maple

Neck- Mahogany

Neck Profile- Rounded

Fingerboard- Rosewood

Fingerboard Radius- 12"

Frets- 20

Scale Length- 34"

Nut Width- 1.5625"

Pickups- 2x Gibson Passive Humbuckers

Controls- 3-Way Toggle Switch, Middle Volume, Middle Tone, Bridge Volume, Bridge Tone


Luthier Report


Our ID: 1250426204211

Weight: 9.55lbs  

Serial: ME300535


Aesthetic Condition:

Headstock: Overall excellent condition. All aspects of the headstock demonstrate light scratching visible only under direct lighting at certain angles.


Neck: Overall excellent condition. The fingerboard demonstrates some light "roundwound markings" where the string has been pressed into the fingerboard. This does not affect the overall playability of the instrument and cannot be felt under the string. Light scratching and indentations are present across the register to the rear of the neck, these can lightly be felt in the playing position.


Body: Overall very good condition. All aspects of the body demonstrate light to mild scratching visible only under direct lighting at certain angles. This is most notable to the upper bout of the rear face consistent with playwear. The bass side horn demonstrates an indentation that has marked but not removed the finish to the front face. The bass and treble sides of lower bout demonstrate small less severe indentations near the binding. 


Condition of Frets:

The frets demonstrate very light signs of use, not affecting playability. There is considerable material remaining for any future fret work the new owner may wish to perform.


Current Set Up:

Truss Rod: Fully functional. Truss rod tool (5/16" socket) not included.

Hardware: Very good condition with light tarnishing to the pickup covers. The original bridge has been replaced with a Babictz FCH 3-point 4-string bridge. The original bridge is included in the case.

Structural: No concerns or issues to note.

Height of the string from the 12th Fret-2mm - Bass 2.5mm

Please be aware that the action on a guitar may move slightly in transit and this measurement is the current height.


Strings on Guitar - 45-100


Electrics: 

Fully functional.


Case & Accessories:

Original Gibson Hard Case

Very good condition. COA, QC checklist & original bridge included in the case. Truss rod tool not included. 


Please be aware that for international buyers import fees are not included in our postage and packaging cost, this only covers the cost of the guitar being sent to you. Import fees will be charged by Customs upon the guitar's arrival in the recipient country. Due to Brexit, this also applies to EU buyers. We advise checking the total import cost with Customs as this is not information we are able to accurately provide.

item.title: Spector USA NS-5XL — $5,400
item.description:
$5,400 · Excellent · Joe 's Gear Outlet

Built in Jan. of 2026. Weight = 10lbs. 5oz.

NS-5XL

-- 5-String

-- 35" Scale

-- Standard Spacing

-- 2-Piece Construction

---- Flame Maple Top

---- Plain Maple Back

-- Spector Branded Gotoh

-- Bridge =

-- Hardware =

Bass is in new condition. Absolutely flawless.

item.title: Travis Bean Designs TB2000 Bass 2024 - Metallic Green Burst — $5,000
item.description:
$5,000 · Excellent · Supersonic Fuzz Vintage & Unique Gear Boutique

I’ve decided to part ways with my 1 of 1, Travis Bean Designs TB2000 aluminum neck bass in custom metallic green burst. It has a 33.25” scale length, rosewood fretboard and block inlays.


I custom ordered this one with this finish. I believe only one or two other TBD instruments got this finish when Kevin was testing the color. The other custom request was a bass under 10lbs—this one comes in at 9.2lbs, which is amazing (you’ll notice a thin body, plus a plastic back cover to keep extra weight off).


While I love the way this sounds, I never bonded with it the way I had hoped. I’m happy to keep it, but would ultimately love to find it a home where it gets the attention it deserves. It has never been played out live, only at home while practicing.


All sales are final so please ask any questions you have before purchasing or making an offer. I can take more pictures if needed. International buyers please message me to discuss actual shipping costs to your region. 


Thanks for looking!

item.title: Godin Shifter 4 Bass - Vintage Sunburst — $599.99
item.description:
$599.99 · Good · The Bassment

For sale a Godin Shifter 4 bass in a vintage sunburst with gig bag. Bass plays and sounds great, bass has play wear and has wear on the back. The neck is in great shape with no signs of wear. If you have any questions feel free to contact me.

item.title: 2025 Mint Warrior Dran Michael loaded - Amazing bass — $3,799
item.description:
$3,799 · Mint · Shane's Gear Outlet


I have this listed on Facebook groups without fees so it should go anytime.


One of the basses built by the Legend JD right before he got sick and passed away. This bass is as good as it gets with build, playabilty and tone for days. It is loaded up and used as my main bass for the last 5 months in church. Comes from a smoke free home and is babied and kept like new. This bass would cost you close to $7900 and 6 months to build.I added a video demo of this bass in a full band mix using just a DI box for the tone.


Aged Aldar body

Spalted Maple top and headstock

Blue Burst with Poly finish on Body and headstock

34 scale

8.4 pounds

18mm spacing

2025 Warrior Big Bottom Preamp

USA Bartolini pickups

D-Cline Designs Custom matching knobs

Ebony Fretboard with Abalone Block inlays and sword

Heavy Duty Gigbag

Letter of Authenticity

item.title: Fender Jazz Bass 2009 — $697.13
item.description:
$697.13 · Excellent · Phoenix Gear

2009 Mexican Fender Jazz Bass in Blue


All original parts, no signs of wear and no scratches. Has been quite used, but in great condition. I will give it a wipe down before shipping, but I would recommend dusting it and changing the strings.


Feel free to message about any questions and I will happily send over more photos if you require them.

item.title: Yamaha RBX170 4-String Bass Guitar 2010s - Metallic Blue — $349.99
item.description:
$349.99 · Excellent · The Raven Room

Like new Yamaha RBX170Y 4-string bass with a soft backpack case.

item.title: Upgraded Surf Green Squier Classic Vibe '70s Precision Bass - New Pickup and Bridge — $375
item.description:
$375 · Very Good · Tom's Gear Basement

Selling my lightly used Squier Classic Vibe 70s Precision Bass in surf green. This is a great lightweight P-Bass with a slim maple neck, with a matching maple fretboard with black inlays and binding. The bridge has been upgraded to a high-mass Badass Bass III and the pickup has been swapped for a Seymour Duncan Quarter Pounder. There are a couple of small dings on the finish on the back side of the body, but those are only visible on close inspection. This bass plays and sounds great!

Includes a nice quality padded Fender gig bag. Ships free in the Continental US.

item.title: Cort Artisan B4 Element 2021 - Present - Open Pore Natural — $410.99
item.description:
$410.99 · Excellent · The Bassment

For sale a Cort B4 Element, bass is in new condition and never been played out, was kept in a collection still has the plastic on the control Cover and the tag that tells what the preamp is. If you have any questions please feel free to contact me.

item.title: 1978 Fender Precision Bass with Maple Fretboard Antigua — $4,200
item.description:
$4,200 · Excellent · Marc's Gear Emporium

This 1978 fender precision bass is super clean. You can see clearly the staining on the rear of the body from the case over the years.

Includes pickup and bridge covers as shown.

Questions welcome

item.title: 1979 - 1984 Hofner 500/1 Violin Bass - Sunburst - COA by No.Tom, Denmark Street – repaired headstock - UK — $2,788.50
item.description:
$2,788.50 · Fair · ADH Guitars and Studio

Certificate of Authenticity by No.Tom vintage guitars Denmark Street, London

AI description

For sale is a cool and authentic Hofner 500/1 Violin Bass from the late 1970s to early 1980s. Finished in a rich sunburst, this is the iconic violin-shaped hollowbody bass made famous by Paul McCartney.These German-made Hofner Violin Basses are beloved for their lightweight construction, comfortable playability, and that classic punchy, articulate tone with excellent sustain. This example has the right look, feel, and character that players chase.

Key Details:

  • Period-correct late ‘70s / early ‘80s construction
  • Original hardware throughout (tailpiece stamped “Made in West Germany”)
  • Pix-made blade-style pickups
  • Sunburst finish with nice vintage wear

Honest Condition Notes (per No.Tom):This is a genuine player-grade example that shows honest signs of use over 40+ years:

  • Previous headstock repair (structurally sound, cosmetic only)
  • Some non-original tape on the underside of the neck pickup
  • Minor previous lacquer work
  • Would benefit from a full professional setup to optimise playability
  • Supplied with a non-original case

Despite the minor work, the bass remains structurally solid and retains strong vintage Hofner DNA. It plays well and delivers that unmistakable Violin Bass tone.

Perfect for Beatles fans, collectors, or anyone looking for a lightweight, toneful vintage bass that stands out from the usual crowd. These instruments are only getting harder to find in playable condition.


Collection Kent, TN12 or can arrange for pickup in Dagenham, RM9 or possibly London, SW11 but may take a week or two.

item.title: 1963 Gibson EB-3 Bass – COA by No.Tom, Denmark Street – Vintage SG-Style Short Scale refinished White — $3,485.63
item.description:
$3,485.63 · Good · ADH Guitars and Studio

Certificate of Authenticity by No.Tom vintage guitars Denmark Street, London

AI description -

Up for sale is a cool early 1960s Gibson EB-3 in Cream White finish. This is the rare double-humbucker version of Gibson’s classic short-scale bass, famous for its thick, punchy tone and incredible playability.

Highlights:

  • 1963 model (early production year)
  • Classic SG-style double-cutaway mahogany body
  • Short scale (30.5")
  • Dual humbuckers: large neck humbucker + mini-humbucker at the bridge with metal cover
  • Iconic 4-way rotary Varitone/tone switch (gives you neck only, bridge only, both, and the famous “choke” mid-notched setting)
  • Volume and tone controls for each pickup
  • Black headstock with pearl Gibson logo and crown inlay
  • Rosewood fingerboard with dot inlays
  • Original hardware including the one-piece bridge/tailpiece

Comes with hard case

This bass has that unmistakable vintage Gibson growl and warmth — perfect for classic rock, blues, or that Jack Bruce / Cream vibe (the EB-3 is the exact model he made famous). It’s also surprisingly versatile thanks to the 4-way switch.

A genuine piece of 1960s Gibson history that still sounds and plays fantastic today.


Collection Kent, TN12 or can arrange for pickup in Dagenham, RM9 or possibly London, SW11 but may take a week or two.

item.title: Ibanez SR5FMDX-EGL Premium Soundgear 5-String Electric Bass Guitar Limited Edition Emerald Green Low Gloss — $1,670
item.description:
$1,670 · Brand New · The 1979 Shop

Ibanez SR5FMDX-EGL Premium Soundgear 5-String Electric Bass Guitar - Emerald Green Low Gloss, Limited Edition
Brand New, Unplayed
Approx. Weight is 9 LBS

item.title: Sire Marcus Miller V7 Vintage Alder New Gen 5-string Electric Bass Guitar - Natural (MMV7VNG5Natd4) — $791.10
item.description:
$791.10 · B-Stock · GearNuts

$87 Demo Savings!

Item Condition:

There are cracks sprouting from the pole piece at the treble side end of the neck pickup. There are fine scratches appearing on both of the pickups. There may also be fine blemishes on various parts of the instrument that are not photographed. These blemishes do not show well in photos if at all. The following accessories are included: bridge cover allen wrenches and warranty.

item.title: Ibanez BTB805MS-TGF Bass Workshop 2025 - Transparent Gray Flat — $950
item.description:
$950 · Excellent · Joe's Gear

Close to unused, bought for a project that never materialized, and now selling to raise money for moving.

Killer multiscale 5-string, 9lbs 07oz when I bought it from Sweetwater.

Will be shipped with signature required.

item.title: Lakland Skyline 44-51 - Candy Red — $950
item.description:
$950 · Excellent · Ray's Place

Here's my Beautiful Lakland Skyline 44-51 with a matching headstock up for sale.

Incredible sounding bass and plays fantastic!

1.625 at the nut

...and the down side!...10lbs.

Still sits well with a wide strap!

Ash slab body

Dunlop strap pins And a drop-D tuner

It does have a tiny dent on the bottom edge of the neck. It was like that when I got it. Light swirling on the back, you can see it in the right light. I still consider it in excellent condition.

Comes with a nice Lakland gig bag!
